message:
feat(pages): Add QR code generation for recovery secrets (P2.3)

Implements complete QR code generation module with:
- RecoverySecret: 256-bit high-entropy secret generation
- RecoveryArtifacts: generates recovery-secret.txt, qr-code.png, qr-code.svg
- Base64url encoding for compact, URL-safe representation
- Conditional compilation via 'qr' feature (enabled by default)
- Zeroization on drop for security

Adds qrcode and image dependencies as optional features.

9 unit tests cover secret generation, encoding round-trip, minimum
entropy validation, and QR code format verification.

Part of bead coding_agent_session_search-o532.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -80,10 +80,18 @@ zeroize = { version = "*", features = ["derive"] }
 flate2 = "*"
 rand = "0.8"  # Pin to 0.8.x for rand_core 0.6.x compatibility with argon2/aes-gcm
 
+# QR code generation (optional, for recovery secret QR codes)
+qrcode = { version = "*", optional = true }
+image = { version = "*", optional = true, default-features = false, features = ["png"] }
+
 # macOS keychain access (optional, for ChatGPT decryption)
 [target.'cfg(target_os = "macos")'.dependencies]
 security-framework = "2.11"
 
+[features]
+default = ["qr"]
+qr = ["dep:qrcode", "dep:image"]
+
 [build-dependencies]
 vergen = { version = "*", default-features = false, features = ["build", "cargo"] }
